summary: Phase 1 Features Testing Complete - ALL FEATURES VERIFIED. Tested OTP flow logic (code review), email registration no-auto-login (code review), user activity filtering (backend API + UI), loyalty tier badge (UI verified for customer=Bronze badge, admin=no badge)

otp_flow.success_state_ui: PASS - Green checkmark icon (CheckCircle) with bg-green-100, 'Verified!' title in green-700
otp_flow.account_activated_message: PASS - Shows 'Your account has been activated!' after OTP verified
otp_flow.redirect_to_login: PASS - After 2.5 seconds timeout, redirects to AUTH_VIEWS.LOGIN (no auto-login)
otp_flow.error_state_actions: PASS - Red error box shows 'Resend Code' and 'Edit Info' buttons when OTP fails

email_registration.no_auto_login: PASS - After successful registration, shows message and redirects to LOGIN view
email_registration.success_message: PASS - Shows 'Account created successfully! Please login with your credentials.'

user_activity_log_filtering.filtering_differentiates: PASS - Superadmin (728) vs Admin (95) proves filtering works
user_activity_log_filtering.ui_integration: PASS - Activity Log tab in UserDetailModal shows filtered activities per user
user_activity_log_filtering.query_logic: Uses actor_id OR actor_email for activity_logs, user_id/actor_id/actor_email for audit_logs

loyalty_tier_badge.customer_badge_visible: PASS - Customer sees '🥉 Bronze' badge next to name in header
loyalty_tier_badge.admin_no_badge: PASS - Admin/SuperAdmin header does NOT show loyalty badge
loyalty_tier_badge.api_response: PASS - /api/loyalty/program returns tier='bronze' with 4710 points for customer

critical_code_review_comments: OTP flow correctly implements visual feedback with animated green checkmark (animate-[scale-in_0.3s_ease-out])
OTP error state provides user-friendly actions: Resend Code (with countdown) and Edit Info to go back
Email registration correctly redirects to login view instead of auto-logging in user
User activity API correctly filters by actor_email field (not just actor_id which is often null)
Loyalty badge conditional rendering properly checks user.role === 'customer' before showing
All tier badge colors use appropriate semantic backgrounds (amber for bronze, slate for silver, yellow for gold, violet for platinum)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 features verified: (1) OTP flow shows green checkmark success, 'Account activated' message, redirects to login after 2.5s, error shows resend/edit buttons; (2) Email registration redirects to login (no auto-login); (3) User activity API filters by actor_email field - superadmin=728, admin=95 activities; (4) Loyalty badge shows for customers only (bronze tier with 🥉 emoji). Customer user ID: e31df4e5-c8b8-4701-83ea-66a6b3cebbab.
